# PHIL.157 ? Time as Scarce Resource

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** resource_allocation
**Subcategory:** time_as_scarce_resource
**Domain:** RESOURCE_ALLOCATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Treat time as the ultimate non-renewable resource

## Application
Guard time fiercely, prioritize ruthlessly, eliminate time wasters, value speed
